overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage featuring a hooded protagonist navigating through a historical Middle Eastern city. The character moves from narrow tiled passages through sun-drenched courtyards and bustling streets lined with mud-brick architecture, palm trees, and market stalls under a clear midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow tiled passage opening into residential street

events.description: exits blue-tiled archway into sunlit open street
character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow passage and emerging into street, glancing at NPCs along the path

notable_agents.action: two guards in red uniforms standing near a building entrance

entered.detail: ornate archway with blue geometric tile patterns marking the passage entrance
tan-colored traditional mud brick structures with wooden accents lining the street
tall palm trees visible in the distance beyond the buildings
stacked wooden barrels and crates against the passage wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow passage with blue tiled columns, transitioning through an archway into a sunlit residential street. The character moves from walking to running, passing two guards in red uniforms standing near a building entrance. Mud-brick buildings line the dirt road with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential courtyard with stone columns and hanging laundry

events.description: enters columned courtyard area from the street
passes under hanging laundry temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: navigating through the courtyard, passing seated NPCs and walking through narrow covered passages

notable_agents.action: person in green robe sitting on stone bench near the courtyard entrance

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone columns supporting the courtyard roof structure
white fabric sheets and textiles hanging on lines between buildings
dark wooden door with intricate geometric carvings and metal studs
terracotta pots with green shrubs lining the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded residential courtyard featuring stone columns and potted plants. Passing under hanging laundry that briefly obscures the view, the scene transitions through narrow alleyways with carved wooden doors. The lighting becomes diffused as the character moves through the semi-covered spaces between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: main thoroughfare with palm trees and ornate buildings

events.description: exits narrow alleys into wide palm-lined street
turns left at the large stone building intersection

agents.ego_description: jogging down the wide street following an NPC, approaching a large ornate building with arched doorways

notable_agents.action: civilian in gray robes walking ahead of the character down the street

entered.detail: tall date palms lining both sides of the wide central street
large two-story building with arched doorways and decorative stonework
tall defensive wall with crenellations visible behind the buildings
simple wooden structure with fabric awning displaying goods

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alleys, the scene opens into a wide sunlit thoroughfare lined with palm trees. The character runs toward an ornate stone mansion with large carved doorways, passing a wooden market stall. The city walls are visible in the background as the character follows a civilian through the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: market plaza approaching a building with scaffolding

events.description: enters open plaza area with market stalls and hanging lanterns
slows approach to building with guards standing outside

agents.ego_description: running through market area and approaching a building with wooden scaffolding, observing guards near the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of guards in red uniforms standing guard outside the building entrance

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with fabric awnings displaying various goods
metal lanterns suspended on wires across the street overhead
rough wooden scaffolding and platforms attached to the building facade
low circular stone structure, possibly a dry fountain base

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a market plaza with wooden stalls and hanging lanterns suspended overhead. The character approaches a building with prominent wooden scaffolding, slowing as they near guards in red uniforms standing at the entrance. The scene features open plaza space with scattered pedestrians and market activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded, tiled corridors of a residential district into the expansive, bustling activity of a city market plaza. It begins in a narrow passage with blue tiled columns, moving through an archway into a sunlit street where the character runs past guards stationed near mud-brick buildings. As the character enters a shaded residential courtyard, the view briefly passes under hanging laundry and through narrow alleyways with carved wooden doors, shifting the lighting to a diffused glow. The scene then opens into a wide, sun-drenched thoroughfare lined with palm trees and ornate stone mansions before turning toward a crowded market plaza. Finally, the camera glides under hanging lanterns and past wooden stalls, slowing as it approaches a building with wooden scaffolding and guards at the entrance.
